# GodeX

> OpenAI Responses API gateway — translates /v1/responses into upstream Chat Completions API calls so any LLM provider can drive Codex. Built with Bun and TypeScript using the @ahoo-wang/fetcher ecosystem.

## Onboarding

- [Contributor Guide](onboarding/contributor-guide.md): Setup, first PR, codebase patterns, testing
- [Staff Engineer Guide](onboarding/staff-engineer-guide.md): Architecture, design decisions, system boundaries
- [Executive Guide](onboarding/executive-guide.md): Capabilities, risks, investment thesis
- [Product Manager Guide](onboarding/product-manager-guide.md): Features, user journeys, FAQ

## Architecture

- [Architecture Overview](02-architecture/architecture-overview.md): End-to-end request flow, core types, component model
- [Compatibility Planning](02-architecture/compatibility.md): How features are planned as supported/degraded/ignored/rejected
- [Request Building](02-architecture/request-building.md): Responses API to Chat Completions conversion
- [Response Reconstruction](02-architecture/response-reconstruction.md): Chat Completions responses to ResponseObject
- [Stream Reconstruction](02-architecture/stream-reconstruction.md): Stream state machine and delta-to-event mapping
- [Tool Planning](02-architecture/tool-planning.md): Tool catalog, declarations, identity mapping
- [Output Contracts](02-architecture/output-contracts.md): JSON schema validation and degradation
- [Sync Pipeline](02-architecture/sync-pipeline.md): Synchronous request orchestration
- [Streaming Pipeline](02-architecture/streaming-pipeline.md): Stream pipeline and transform chain
- [Stream Transforms](02-architecture/stream-transforms.md): Composable TransformStream stages
- [Model Resolution](02-architecture/model-resolution.md): Model aliasing and selector parsing
- [Server Routes](02-architecture/server-routes.md): Bun HTTP routes and request dispatch

## Getting Started

- [Overview](01-getting-started/overview.md): What GodeX does and why it exists
- [Quick Start](01-getting-started/quick-start.md): Install, configure, first API call
- [Configuration Guide](01-getting-started/configuration.md): godex.yaml reference, env interpolation, CLI overrides
- [Built-in Providers](01-getting-started/builtin-providers.md): DeepSeek, Zhipu, MiniMax comparison
- [CLI](01-getting-started/cli.md): Commander program, init wizard, serve command

## Provider Development

- [Provider Spec](03-provider-development/provider-spec.md): ProviderSpec and ProviderEdge contracts
- [Provider Hooks](03-provider-development/provider-hooks.md): patchRequest, normalizeResponse, stream deltas
- [Chat Provider Client](03-provider-development/chat-provider-client.md): Shared HTTP client for providers

## Session Management

- [Session Stores](04-session-management/session-stores.md): Memory and SQLite backends
- [Chain Resolution](04-session-management/chain-resolution.md): previous_response_id traversal

## Infrastructure

- [Trace System](10-trace/trace-system.md): Async trace recording, SQLite storage, payload capture
- [Error Handling](06-error-handling/error-handling.md): GodeXError hierarchy, domain codes
- [Logging](07-configuration/logging.md): LogTape-based structured logging
- [Testing](08-testing/testing.md): Unit, E2E, live provider tests
- [Deployment](09-deployment/deployment.md): Docker, native binary, CI/CD
